tools.name: blocks_delete-a
tools.description: Delete a block. Required: block_id. Destructive.

tools.name: blocks_query-meeting-notes
tools.description: Query meeting notes. Optional: filter, limit, sort. Returns the new BlocksQueryMeetingNotesResponse.

params.name: filter
params.description: Optional filter for querying meeting notes. Supports combinator (and/or) and property filters on title, attendees, created_time, created_by, last_edited_time, last_edited_by.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 50.

params.name: sort
params.description: Optional sort order for the results. Each entry specifies a property name and direction.

tools.name: blocks_retrieve-a
tools.description: Retrieve a block. Required: block_id.

tools.name: blocks_update-a
tools.description: Update a block. Required: block_id. Partial update.

tools.name: blocks_children_get-block
tools.description: Retrieve block children. Required: block_id. Optional: start_cursor, page_size. Returns the Block.

tools.name: blocks_children_patch-block
tools.description: Append block children. Required: block_id, children. Optional: position. Returns the updated Block.

tools.name: comments_create-a
tools.description: Create a comment.

tools.name: comments_delete-a
tools.description: Delete a comment. Required: comment_id. Destructive.

tools.name: comments_list
tools.description: List comments. Required: block_id. Optional: start_cursor, page_size. Returns the CommentsListResponse.

tools.name: comments_retrieve
tools.description: Retrieve a comment. Required: comment_id.

tools.name: comments_update-a
tools.description: Update a comment. Required: comment_id. Partial update.

tools.name: custom-emojis_list
tools.description: List custom emojis. Optional: start_cursor, page_size, name. Returns the CustomEmojisListResponse.

tools.name: data-sources_create-a-database
tools.description: Create a data source. Required: parent, properties. Optional: icon, title.

params.name: parent
params.description: An object specifying the parent of the new data source to be created.

params.name: title
params.description: Title of data source as it appears in Notion.

tools.name: data-sources_retrieve-a
tools.description: Retrieve a data source. Required: data_source_id.

tools.name: data-sources_update-a
tools.description: Update a data source. Required: data_source_id. Optional: icon, in_trash, parent (plus 2 more). Partial update.

params.name: in_trash
params.description: Whether the database should be moved to or from the trash. If not provided, the trash status will not be updated.

params.name: parent
params.description: The parent of the data source, when moving it to a different database. If not provided, the parent will not be updated.

params.name: properties
params.description: The property schema of the data source. The keys are property names or IDs, and the values are property configuration objects. Properties set to null will be removed.

params.name: title
params.description: Title of data source as it appears in Notion.

tools.name: data-sources_query_post-database
tools.description: Query a data source. Required: data_source_id. Optional: filter_properties, filter, in_trash (plus 4 more). Returns the new PageOrDataSource.

params.name: result_type
params.description: Optionally filter the results to only include pages or data sources. Regular, non-wiki databases only support page children. The default behavior is no result type filtering, in other words, returning both pages and data sources for wikis.

tools.name: data-sources_templates_list-data-source
tools.description: List templates in a data source. Required: data_source_id. Optional: name, start_cursor, page_size. Returns the TemplatesListDataSourceResponse.

tools.name: databases_create
tools.description: Create a database. Required: parent. Optional: cover, description, icon (plus 3 more).

params.name: cover
params.description: The cover image for the database.

params.name: initial_data_source
params.description: Initial data source configuration for the database.

params.name: is_inline
params.description: Whether the database should be displayed inline in the parent page. Defaults to false.

params.name: parent
params.description: The parent page or workspace where the database will be created.

tools.name: databases_retrieve
tools.description: Retrieve a database. Required: database_id.

tools.name: databases_update
tools.description: Update a database. Required: database_id. Optional: cover, description, icon (plus 5 more). Partial update.

params.name: cover
params.description: The updated cover image for the database, if any. If not provided, the cover will not be updated.

params.name: description
params.description: The updated description of the database, if any. If not provided, the description will not be updated.

params.name: icon
params.description: The updated icon for the database, if any. If not provided, the icon will not be updated.

params.name: in_trash
params.description: Whether the database should be moved to or from the trash. If not provided, the trash status will not be updated.

params.name: is_inline
params.description: Whether the database should be displayed inline in the parent page. If not provided, the inline status will not be updated.

params.name: is_locked
params.description: Whether the database should be locked from editing in the Notion app UI. If not provided, the locked state will not be updated.

params.name: parent
params.description: The parent page or workspace to move the database to. If not provided, the database will not be moved.

params.name: title
params.description: The updated title of the database, if any. If not provided, the title will not be updated.

tools.name: file-uploads_create-file
tools.description: Create a file upload. Optional: content_type, external_url, filename (plus 2 more). Returns the new FileUploadObjectResponse.

params.name: content_type
params.description: MIME type of the file to be created. Recommended when sending the file in multiple parts. Must match the content type of the file that's sent, and the extension of the `filename` parameter if any.

params.name: external_url
params.description: When `mode` is `external_url`, provide the HTTPS URL of a publicly accessible file to import into your workspace.

params.name: filename
params.description: Name of the file to be created. Required when `mode` is `multi_part`. Otherwise optional, and used to override the filename. Must include an extension, or have one inferred from the `content_type` parameter.

params.name: mode
params.description: How the file is being sent. Use `multi_part` for files larger than 20MB. Use `external_url` for files that are temporarily hosted publicly elsewhere. Default is `single_part`.

params.name: number_of_parts
params.description: When `mode` is `multi_part`, the number of parts you are uploading. This must match the number of parts as well as the final `part_number` you send.

tools.name: file-uploads_list
tools.description: List file uploads. Optional: status, start_cursor, page_size. Returns the FileUploadsListResponse.

tools.name: file-uploads_retrieve
tools.description: Retrieve a file upload. Required: file_upload_id. Returns the FileUploadObjectResponse.

tools.name: file-uploads_complete_file-upload
tools.description: Complete a multi-part file upload. Required: file_upload_id. Returns the new FileUploadObjectResponse.

tools.name: file-uploads_send_upload-file
tools.description: Upload a file. Required: file_upload_id, file. Optional: part_number. Returns the new FileUploadObjectResponse.

params.name: file
params.description: The raw binary file contents to upload.

params.name: part_number
params.description: When uploading files greater than 20MB in parts, this is the current part number. Must be an integer between 1 and 1,000.

tools.name: notion-search_post
tools.description: Search by title. Optional: filter, page_size, query (plus 2 more). Returns the new PageOrDataSource.

tools.name: oauth_create-a-token
tools.description: Exchange an authorization code for an access and refresh token. Returns the new OauthCreateATokenResponse.

tools.name: oauth_introspect-token
tools.description: Introspect a token. Required: token. Returns the new OauthIntrospectTokenResponse.

tools.name: oauth_revoke-token
tools.description: Revoke a token. Required: token. Returns the new OauthRevokeTokenResponse.

tools.name: pages_patch
tools.description: Update page. Required: page_id. Optional: cover, erase_content, icon (plus 5 more). Partial update.

params.name: erase_content
params.description: Whether to erase all existing content from the page. When used with a template, the template content replaces the existing content. When used without a template, simply clears the page content.

params.name: is_locked
params.description: Whether the page should be locked from editing in the Notion app UI. If not provided, the locked state will not be updated.

tools.name: pages_post
tools.description: Create a page. Optional: children, content, cover (plus 6 more).

params.name: markdown
params.description: Page content as Notion-flavored Markdown. Mutually exclusive with content/children.

tools.name: pages_retrieve-a
tools.description: Retrieve a page. Required: page_id. Optional: filter_properties.

tools.name: pages_markdown_retrieve-page
tools.description: Retrieve a page as markdown. Required: page_id. Optional: include_transcript. Returns the PageMarkdownResponse.

tools.name: pages_markdown_update-page
tools.description: Update a page's content as markdown. Required: page_id. Returns the updated PageMarkdownResponse.

tools.name: pages_move_page
tools.description: Move a page. Required: page_id, parent.

params.name: parent
params.description: The new parent of the page.

tools.name: pages_properties_retrieve-a-page-property
tools.description: Retrieve a page property item. Required: page_id, property_id. Optional: start_cursor, page_size.

tools.name: users_get
tools.description: List all users. Optional: start_cursor, page_size. Returns the User.

tools.name: users_get-self
tools.description: Retrieve your token's bot user. Returns the UserObjectResponse.

tools.name: users_get-userid
tools.description: Retrieve a user. Required: user_id. Returns the UserObjectResponse.

tools.name: views_create
tools.description: Create a view. Required: data_source_id, name, type. Optional: configuration, create_database, database_id (plus 6 more).

params.name: configuration
params.description: View presentation configuration. The type field must match the view type.

params.name: create_database
params.description: Create a new linked database block on a page and add the view to it. Mutually exclusive with database_id and view_id.

params.name: data_source_id
params.description: The ID of the data source this view should be scoped to.

params.name: database_id
params.description: The ID of the database to create a view in. Mutually exclusive with view_id and create_database.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter to apply to the view. Uses the same format as the data source query filter.

params.name: placement
params.description: Where to place the new widget in a dashboard view. Only applicable when view_id is provided. Defaults to creating a new row at the end.

params.name: position
params.description: Where to place the new view in the database's view tab bar. Only applicable when database_id is provided. Defaults to 'end' (append).

params.name: quick_filters
params.description: Quick filters to pin in the view's filter bar. Keys are property names or IDs. Values are filter conditions (same shape as a property filter but without the property field). Each quick filter appears as a clickable pill above the view, independent of the advanced filter.

params.name: sorts
params.description: Sorts to apply to the view. Uses the same format as the data source query sorts.

params.name: type
params.description: The type of view to create.

params.name: view_id
params.description: The ID of a dashboard view to add this view to as a widget. Mutually exclusive with database_id and create_database.

tools.name: views_delete
tools.description: Delete a view. Required: view_id. Returns the PartialDataSourceViewObjectResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: views_list
tools.description: List views. Optional: database_id, data_source_id, start_cursor (plus 1 more). Returns the ViewsListResponse.

tools.name: views_retrieve-a
tools.description: Retrieve a view. Required: view_id.

tools.name: views_update-a
tools.description: Update a view. Required: view_id. Optional: configuration, filter, name (plus 2 more). Partial update.

params.name: configuration
params.description: View presentation configuration. The type field must match the view type. Individual nullable fields within the configuration can be set to null to clear them.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter to apply to the view. Uses the same format as the data source query filter. Pass null to clear the filter.

params.name: quick_filters
params.description: Quick filters for the view's filter bar. Keys are property names or IDs. Set a key to a filter condition to add/update that quick filter. Set a key to null to remove it. Pass null for the entire field to clear all quick filters. Unmentioned quick filters are preserved.

params.name: sorts
params.description: Property sorts to apply to the view. Only property-based sorts are supported. Pass null to clear the sorts.

tools.name: views_queries_create-view-query
tools.description: Create a view query. Required: view_id. Optional: page_size. Returns the new ViewQueryResponse.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of results to return per page. Maximum: 100

tools.name: views_queries_delete-view-query
tools.description: Delete a view query. Required: view_id, query_id. Returns the DeletedViewQueryResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: views_queries_get-view-query-results
tools.description: Get view query results. Required: view_id, query_id. Optional: start_cursor, page_size. Returns the QueriesGetViewQueryResultsResponse.
